instruction: Three things wrong with the camera off icon: the base outline is gray, the small cyan dot is orange (wrong color), AND the small cyan dot has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/camera-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #9ca3af" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/><path d="M21 21H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3m3-3h6l2 3h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v9.34m-7.72-2.06a4 4 0 1 1-5.56-5.56"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#f97316" cx="112" cy="8" r="2" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/camera-off.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="1" y1="1" x2="23" y2="23"/><path d="M21 21H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3m3-3h6l2 3h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v9.34m-7.72-2.06a4 4 0 1 1-5.56-5.56"/></g>
  <circle id="dot" fill="#06b6d4" cx="112" cy="16" r="2" />
</svg>
